//: Scoped TypeScript config. The app is otherwise plain JS + JSDoc (see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md deviation #1); TS is introduced ONLY for the usage-review anomaly engine, which the Retail/Homeowner spec mandates be strict TypeScript with no `any`. Vite/esbuild transpiles .ts in the app bundle without type-checking, so `npm run typecheck` (tsc --noEmit) is what actually enforces strictness in CI. Tests run through Node 22's native type-stripping.
